
  // Type_decimal
  public class Type_decimal {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_float : Vx_Core.Type_float = Vx_Core.e_float
    var type_int : Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    var type_number : Vx_Core.Type_number = Vx_Core.e_number
  }
  // Generic_decimal_any
  public class Generic_decimal_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_decimal = e_decimal
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_decimal_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_decimal
    }
  }
  // Generic_decimal_type
  public class Generic_decimal_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_decimal = v_decimal_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_decimal = v_decimal_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_decimal = v_decimal_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_decimal = f_decimal(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_decimal_constructor
  public static func v_decimal_constructor(
  ) -> Type_decimal {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_decimal()
  }
  // v_decimal_create
  public static func v_decimal_create(
  ) -> Type_decimal {
    var output : Type_decimal = v_decimal_constructor()
    v_decimal_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_decimal_register
  public static func v_decimal_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_decimal_startup_type()
    v_decimal_startup_empty()
    return t_decimal
  }
  // v_decimal_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_decimal_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_decimal
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_decimal_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    var type_float : Vx_Core.Type_float = value.type_float
    var type_int : Vx_Core.Type_int = value.type_int
    var type_number : Vx_Core.Type_number = value.type_number
    value.type_float = Vx_Core.e_float
    value.type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    value.type_number = Vx_Core.e_number
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(
      [
        type_float.type_any,
        type_int.type_any,
        type_number.type_any
      ]
    )
  }
  // v_decimal_startup - mutating
  public static func v_decimal_startup(
    _ value : Type_decimal
  ) {
    let generic_any = Generic_decimal_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_decimal,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_decimal_startup_empty
  public static func v_decimal_startup_empty() {
    v_decimal_startup(e_decimal)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_decimal,
      e_decimal.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_decimal_startup_type
  public static func v_decimal_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_decimal
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/decimal")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.e_string
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_decimal_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  public static let t_decimal : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.Type_type()
  public static let e_decimal : Type_decimal = Type_decimal()
